description: Style Note Stylish top from mineral, perfect for the modern fashionista. A smart recombination of natural fabrics with a western construct, it's a must-have this season. Product Details Mango yellow top, has a round neck with lace detailing, three-buttoned placket, two-tiered frills across the chest, short sleeves with elasticated cuffs and elasticated hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
